analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class feature naming and structure. 'Spellcasting' is the foundational feature for the Sorcerer class.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description clearly defines the narrative source and mechanical result (fueling spells) of the Sorcerer's magic.

mechanics.core_mechanic: Establishes the Sorcerer's connection to arcane magic which dictates how they prepare, learn, and cast spells.
mechanics.level_dependency: Typically granted at level 1, which matches the 'level': 1 entry.
mechanics.impact: Fundamental. Without this feature, the class has no mechanical identity.

analysis.recommendations: No changes required. This is a standard, core class feature definition.
